Failing doesn't count as a lesson if you're not developing a new skill from each one.

I had direction. I had a goal. I went straight at it for years, but none of my businesses worked until I had built up my skill set.

Each failed opportunity developed a different skill that I

Ecom products to avoid at all costs:
($1B+ in sales across my brands taught me to walk away from every one of these)

- Under 70% gross margin. Gross margin compression has killed more of my brands than bad new product launches ever did.

- Nobody can see it being used in public

tweets.text:
As a CEO, u gotta step BACK for ur execs to step IN.

When I started Bustem I had 1 VA, a spreadsheet and a slack channel.

Had to be on top of everything... bc I WAS everything.

> Hiring
> CSM, CRM
> Fulfillment
> Marketing, branding

Today, the team's 40+ ppl protecting 160+

Hot take: the "right time" to start is a MYTH!!

It's invented by ppl who r just scared.

There is no right time.

There's only the moment u decide the cost of not starting is higher than the cost of being "wrong".

Newsflash. That's right now.

A mistake I'll NEVER repeat again:

I walked into a meeting last year completely unprepared.

Thought I knew the client well enough. Skipped the research. Winged it.

Lost the deal in the first 10mins.

Not bc my pitch was bad, but bc I asked a question about their business that

It sounds counterintuitive, but an additional option that looks like a slightly worse deal can easily push almost anyone toward the option you

tweets.text: Fable5 wasn't a step change. It felt like a model that was slightly smarter than Opus but instructed to use maximum effort by default. That still still means it was the most capable option available.

A masterclass in @Shopify dark app marketing: fake countdown timer, "20 spots left," and a free-forever bribe for a 5-star review. That’s how Hoppy apps games its rating, seemingly with zero consequences. We should all be so brazen.
Fable 5 tokens: In: 1.9m · Out: 3.8m. Est Total: $209. Look at that hockey stick. Fable just eats tokens. https://t.co/O8vSm3gJLi
